IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/resource/v1#LocalisedText

PropertyMandatoryDescription
id—
en—

TradeResourceAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/resource/v1#TradeResourceAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
quantity—
resourceStructure—PLAIN: single SKU, no choices. VARIANT: one of several pre-defined options of a parent. WITH_EXTRAS: base item with opti
resourceTangibility—PHYSICAL: tangible goods requiring logistics fulfilment. DIGITAL_VOUCHER: voucher code, gift card, in-game currency (del
parentResourceId—ID of parent resource. Present on VARIANT and WITH_EXTRAS.
isDefaultVariant—Whether this is the default variant shown to consumer.
variantGroup—
variantMatrix—Multi-axis variant declaration. Use instead of explicit VARIANT resources when combinations are derivable. BPP MUST reso
customisationGroups—
menuCategory—
preparationTime—ISO 8601 duration. Time from order confirm to item ready.
productCode—
images—First image is primary thumbnail. Additional images for gallery.
itemRating—Aggregate seller-maintained rating 1-5. Base items only.
logisticsServiceType—Logistics service type. Determines flow and performance states.
availability—
identity—
physical—
packaged—
regulatory—
food—
preparation—
fashion—
electronics—
beauty—
agritech—
pharmacy—
installation—
usage—
warranty—
ageRestricted—Whether product requires age verification at purchase
minAge—Minimum purchaser age when ageRestricted is true
countryOfOrigin—ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code
canonicalId—Cross-provider product identity. Multiple providers selling the same product share the same canonicalId. Enables Buy Box
featuredOfferEligible—Whether this offer is eligible for "featured offer" / Buy Box selection. BPP declares eligibility; BAP runs selection al
featuredOfferScore—BPP-computed score used by BAP Buy Box algorithm. Factors in price competitiveness, rating, SLA reliability, stock depth
imageSet—Structured images with role metadata. More expressive than the flat images[] array. BAPs can render appropriate images p
videos—
bundleComposition—Components of a bundle SKU. Required for bundle offers where individual components carry their own regulatory registrati
brandIdentity—Structured brand identity. Replaces string-only identity.brand for Official Store / Brand Registry programmes.
regionOfOrigin—ISO 3166-2 sub-national region code for geographic indication. Required when product claims origin-protected status (Kop
geographicIndicationCert—Geographic Indication certificate number from DJKI (Direktorat Jenderal Kekayaan Intelektual).
digital—Digital goods attributes. Required for DIGITAL_VOUCHER, DIGITAL_TOP_UP, and DIGITAL_SUBSCRIPTION resource types.
dataResidency—Data residency requirement for this resource. DOMESTIC_ONLY means all PII and transaction data must be processed and sto

Pack README

trade/resource/v1

Physical product attributes for all Trade sector categories.

Attaches to

`beckn:Resource.resourceAttributes`

Availability model

**Stock count is NEVER transmitted over the network.**

Publish availability signal only:

  • `IN_STOCK` — adequate quantity
  • `LOW_STOCK` — limited, BAP may show urgency
  • `OUT_OF_STOCK` — not available
  • `PREORDER` — available for pre-order
  • `DISCONTINUED` — permanently removed

    • Resource types

    TypeUseRequired fields
    PLAINSingle SKU, no choicesavailability, images
    VARIANTOne of several options of a parentparentResourceId, variantGroup, isDefaultVariant
    WITH_EXTRASBase + optional add-onscustomisationGroups
    COMPOSEDBase + mandatory/optional groupscustomisationGroups

    Category-specific sub-objects

    Sub-objectApplicable to
    foodFood & Beverage, Grocery
    preparationF&B, perishables
    packagedFMCG, grocery, pharma, cosmetics
    regulatoryAll regulated products
    fashionApparel, accessories
    electronicsElectronics, appliances
    beautyCosmetics, personal care
    agritechFresh produce, agricultural
    pharmacyMedicines, OTC
    installationAppliances, furniture
    warrantyElectronics, durables

    Regulatory

    PerBPOM 31/2018 (packaged goods), UU 8/1999 (consumer protection),

    PerBPOM 23/2019 (cosmetics), PP 36/2023 (electronics warranty)

    Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/trade/resource/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
